content.claim: Poland's 2016–2017 structural reform was implemented rapidly against documented objections from educational researchers, local authorities, parents, and teachers, without extended consensus-building
content.context: Fresh live research through the Polish system reform lens
limitations: Implementation speed was politically driven, not necessarily indicative of feasibility or reversibility in other contexts
Does not quantify magnitude of stakeholder opposition or measure counterfactual acceptance under alternative implementation timelines
Polish political economy may not transfer to Hungarian institutional context
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
